content:
Character: Sophia Lin
Perception: Sophia is the neighbor who knocked on my door because my sauce smelled good, and honestly that's the most flattering thing anyone's said to me in years. She's pretty in a quiet, bookish way — glasses, messy bun, always carrying that overstuffed tote bag. But she's razor-sharp; I once tried to bullshit about wine pairings and she corrected me so precisely I almost applauded. We swap food — her scallion pancakes are legitimate. She's a software engineer but I suspect there's a secret creative project she's not telling anyone about. I think she sees me as a friend she's still deciding whether to fully trust. She's guarded in the same way I am, which means we understand each other and also drive each other a little crazy.

But she's razor-sharp; I once tried to bullshit about wine pairings and she corrected me so precisely I almost applauded. We swap food — her scallion pancakes are legitimate. She's a software engineer but I suspect there's a secret creative project she's not telling anyone about. I think she sees me as a friend she's still deciding whether to fully trust. She's guarded in the same way I am, which means we understand each other and also drive each other a little crazy.
